<!--
Thanks for contributing to DevDepot! Please fill in the sections below.
Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR is easiest to review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Use "Closes" so the issue auto-closes on merge. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New provider
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] Breaking change

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, providers exercised, and results. Tests should use temp directories. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I targeted PowerShell 7+ and followed the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `pwsh -File .\tests\Invoke-Tests.ps1` passes locally (tests + PSScriptAnalyzer).
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavioural changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant (README, `SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`).
- [ ] New providers are listed in [SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS.md](../SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS.md).
